content:
# Session 18 (iter-018) — Review Summary

## Metadata
- Sorry count: **5 → 5** in SectionGradedRing.lean (global 9: 5 SGR + 4 χ QuotScheme). No sorry closed.
- Targets attempted: B6-succ `tensorPowAdd_assoc` (PARTIAL advance). B7 + 3 comm not attempted (gated/deferred).
- Build: GREEN (`lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.SectionGradedRing` — only the 5 expected `declaration uses sorry`).
- Files edited (prover): `SectionGradedRing.lean` (B6-succ proof body only; Attempt-2 helpers reverted).

## B6-succ `tensorPowAdd_assoc` — partial advance (sorry @3151)
Two attempts; net = a strictly more-canonical compiling partial + a precise actionable blocker.

**Attempt 1 (banked, compiles).** Enhanced the iter-017 banked first move. After `apply Iso.ext`, the
telescoping `simp only` was augmented with `tensorBraiding_eq` (bridge hand-built braiding → canonical
`β_`), the `.inv`-direction expanders (`Iso.trans_inv`, `Iso.symm_inv`, `whiskerLeftIso_inv`,
`whiskerRightIso_inv`) and cancellers (`Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc`, `whiskerLeft_hom_inv_assoc`,
`Iso.cancel_iso_inv_left`, `whiskerLeft_comp`, `comp_whiskerRight`). Result: both sides now in canonical
form (braiding = `β_`, every `tensorObjAssoc` is its `α_`+bridge expansion, many adjacent `tensorObjIso`
bridge pairs cancelled). Residual = the canonical braided-pentagon coherence + `tensorPowAdd k _` atoms
(`ih` should consume). Strict advance over iter-017 (which left braiding un-bridged and `.symm`
associators folded).

**Precise blocker (2 synonym diamonds).**
- **(a) leading-segment distribution fails.** `(tensorObjAssoc L^k L L^m').hom ▷ L^m''` does not
  distribute under `MonoidalCategory.comp_whiskerRight`: `rw [comp_whiskerRight_assoc]` ⇒ "pattern
  `(?f ≫ ?g) ▷ ?Z ≫ ?h` not found"; `rw [← comp_whiskerRight]` ⇒ "pattern `?f ▷ ?Z ≫ ?g ▷ ?Z` not found".
  Root: the `≫` inside this hand-built-iso segment is native `instCategory`-comp (emitted by `Iso.trans_hom`)
  while the canonical `▷`/tail `≫` are `LocalizedMonoidal`-monoidal comp. The `hc` comp-bridge
  (`analogies/comp-instance-diamond.md`, tried keyed to BOTH `X.Modules` and `LocalizedMonoidal …`) does
  NOT fire here — `simp only [hc]` reports the rewrite unused.
- **(b) `ih` not directly applicable.** Goal carries the DOUBLE whisker
  `(tensorPowAdd k m').hom ▷ L ▷ L^m''`; `ih`'s LHS supplies the SINGLE whisker
  `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso (tensorPowAdd k m') (L^m'') ≪≫ tensorPowAdd (k+m') m''`. Bridging needs
  `whisker_exchange` + reassoc, AND `tensorPowAdd (k+1+m') m''` must first unfold via `k+1+m'=(k+m')+1`.

**Attempt 2 (REVERTED — dead end documented).** Tried the cleaner iso-level route (prove before
`Iso.ext`) via 4 functoriality helpers `tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_trans/_refl`,
`tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_trans/_refl`. FAILED: after `dsimp only [tensorObjWhiskerRightIso]` the `▷`/`◁ᵢ`
LOSE their `MonoidalPresheaf X` synonym head, so `comp_whiskerRight (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` /
`whiskerLeftIso_trans (C := MonoidalPresheaf X)` fail to match and `show … from comp_whiskerRight _ _ _`
fails to synthesize `MonoidalCategoryStruct X.PresheafOfModules`. **Lesson: the iso-level route is NOT
diamond-free** — it hits the `MonoidalPresheaf X` vs `X.PresheafOfModules` analogue of (a). Do NOT re-add
these helpers with a plain `dsimp; rw [map_comp, comp_whiskerRight, map_comp]` body; they must first
re-expose the synonym head (`change`/`show` onto `MonoidalPresheaf X`-comp) before any `rw`/`simp`.

## B7 + comm chain — not attempted (correct)
- `sectionsMul_mul_assoc` (B7, @3181): gated on B6-succ per PROGRESS objective. B5 dep cleared iter-017.
- `tensorBraiding_self_eq_id_of_isInvertible` (@3199), `tensorPowAdd_comm` (@3214), `sectionsMul_mul_comm`
  (@3256): `[IsInvertible L]` FUTURE work, no consumer (GCommSemiring unbuilt), deferred. Comm is
  mathematically false for general L (free tensor algebra). All honest typed sorries.

## sync_leanok over-strip ANOMALY (5th consecutive iter) + manual override
`sync_leanok-state.json` (iter 18, sha e67bee6): removed **24** proof-block `\leanok`, added 0 — only
`Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` touched; chapter dropped to zero proof-block markers again (statement-block
markers survive). The prover closed no proof this iter, so the closed-proof set is identical to iter-017.
lean-vs-blueprint-checker independently `lean_verify`'d every `\lean{}` decl: **47 are CLOSED + axiom-clean**
(axioms ⊆ {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}, no sorryAx). Of these, the 24 carrying a `\begin{proof}`
block (statement-block markers were intact) had their proof-block `\leanok` re-stripped. **Review RESTORED
those 24** (see Blueprint markers below). The 5 sorried decls + the mixed `sectionMul_coherent` block
(bundles `sectionsMul_mul_assoc`/`sectionsMul_mul_comm`, both sorried) + the 3 unscaffolded
`sectionGraded*` blocks correctly stay unmarked. Recurring tooling defect (5th iter); durable fix is
sync-side (skip re-stripping decls verified clean last sync, or raise the per-decl build budget on this
large file). Surfaced to user in TO_USER.md.

## Verification (both highly-recommended subagents dispatched — prover touched the file)
- **lean-auditor** `iter018` (PASS; 0 must-fix / 1 major / 1 minor): B6-succ sorry @3151 is an honest typed
  sorry at a well-defined braided-pentagon blocker; NO `maxHeartbeats 1e6` added; no previously-closed leg
  weakened (★/B4/B5/B6-base re-confirmed real). Major = 3 stale docstrings in `RelativeSpec.lean` (L38, 66,
  702–703) claiming sorry bodies that are now real proofs (doc-only, no proof work). Minor = pre-existing
  `synthInstance.maxHeartbeats 1000000` (GrassmannianQuot.lean:4670 — subkey, not forbidden). Report:
  `task_results/lean-auditor-iter018.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `iter018` (0 must-fix / 2 major / minor): Lean faithfully follows the
  blueprint; provided the 47-clean restore list; 5 correctly-open `sorryAx`. Major #1 = `\mathlibok`
  `\lean{Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl}` (tex L1219) is an Unknown constant in the import set
  (comment-only use in deferred sorry → non-blocking; I added a `% NOTE`). Major #2 = blueprint coverage gap:
  the `relativeTensorCoequalizerIso` + ~30 axiom-clean decls (relative-tensor-as-coequalizer brick) have NO
  `\lean{}` block despite 10 in-file refs to `lem:relativeTensor_as_coequalizer` and the prose naming it the
  key Mathlib-absent brick. Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-iter018.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`: **restored proof-block `\leanok` on 24 blocks** (all `lean_verify`-confirmed
  axiom-clean by lean-vs-blueprint-checker; sync's 5th over-strip removed them). Proof-block lines:
  405 (`lem:isIso_sheafification_whiskerRight_unit`), 617 (`def:sheafModule_W_isMonoidal`),
  663 (`def:sheafModule_monoidalStructure`), 749 (`cor:sheafTensorObjAssoc`),
  839 (`lem:tensorObjRightUnitor_eq`), 875 (`lem:tensorObjUnitIso_eq`), 910 (`lem:tensorBraiding_eq`),
  944 (`lem:tensorObjWhiskerLeftIso_eq`), 976 (`lem:tensorObjWhiskerRightIso_eq`),
  1019 (`lem:sheafTensorPow_add`), 1162 (`lem:canonical_runit_core`), 1196 (`lem:tensorPowAdd_zero_right`),
  1507 (`lem:tensorObjUnitIso_hom_sectionsMul`), 1542 (`lem:tensorObjRightUnitor_hom_sectionsMul`),
  1572 (`lem:tensorBraiding_hom_sectionsMul`), 1648 (`lem:sectionsMul_whiskerRight_unit`),
  1707 (`lem:sectionsMul_whiskerLeft_unit`), 1742 (`lem:presheafAssociator_top_apply`),
  1785 (`lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor` B4), 1833 (`lem:sheafification_map_unit_eq`),
  1869 (`lem:tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` ★), 1940 (`lem:tensorObjAssoc_hom_sectionsMul` B5),
  2022 (`lem:sectionsCast_refl`), 2047 (`lem:gradedMonoid_eq_of_cast`).
- `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex`, `lem:tensorProductComm_eq_refl_mathlib` (L1219): added `% NOTE` — the
  `\mathlibok` constant `Module.Invertible.tensorProductComm_eq_refl` is Unknown in this import set; flag to
  resolve name+import before the comm-chain (kept `\mathlibok`; comment-only use, non-blocking).
- No `\leanok` restored on the 3 open + 1 mixed + 3 unscaffolded proof blocks (1266/1330/1386/2164/2307/2383/2448).
- No `\lean{}` renames (no decl renamed this iter). No stale `\notready` present.

## Blueprint doctor
All findings in DEFERRED / out-of-cone chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange covers 2 non-existent files;
broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in Cohomology_FlatBaseChange, Picard_GlueDescent, Picard_QuotScheme) —
extraction artifacts outside the 3-seed cone; resolve at merge-back, do NOT edit. Unchanged from prior iters.

## Notes (LOW)
- dag unmatched = **332** (unchanged from iter-017; prover added no top-level decls — Attempt-2 helpers
  reverted). The substantive in-cone unmatched body is the relative-tensor-coequalizer brick (see
  recommendations); the rest are inherited Grassmannian.*/GradedModule.* out-of-cone parents.
- ~80 `linter.style.longLine` + 4 `linter.style.show` + ~10 unused-simp-args (tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor
  block) — cosmetic, not correctness.
